contexts.context: ...and pure soul by imperious brutality and by polished <mark>egotism</mark>. As marriage and love may very well exist...
...them, because Thought, after having exposed Brutality and <mark>Egotism</mark>, takes a fancy to attack Enthusiasm.
..., again, considered it as an effusion of sheer <mark>egotism</mark>, and got into a rage with the author...
..., perhaps you may think, too much of <mark>egotism</mark>. They certainly can be of no further use...
